title: Sable Chunk Guard
description: a small NeoForge patch mod for Sable.
body:
Sable Chunk Guard is a small NeoForge patch mod for Sable.

The mod prevents Sable physics and entity collision code from synchronously loading chunks that are not already fully loaded. When a required chunk is missing or still generating, the unsafe physics or collision calculation is skipped for that tick instead of forcing the server
thread to wait.

This reduces the risk of severe 0 TPS freezes, slow chunk stalls, and world exit hangs caused by Sable interacting with unloaded or generating chunks.
